items.title: Trump squeezes defence industry in new arms race
items.description: Donald Trump said he would curb defence industry bosses’ pay to force them to rearm the United States more quickly.

items.title: Stocks to Watch Wednesday Recap: Strategy, Boeing, Netflix, Paramount
items.description: ↘️Boeing (BA): Shares turned lower in afternoon trading after President Trump criticized the defense industry and called for changes. Shares in the aerospace company had been higher earlier in the day after Alaska Air (ALK) said it would buy more than 100 new aircraft from Boeing.

items.title: RTX and Other Defense Stocks Fall After Trump Says He’ll Ban Dividends, Buybacks
items.description: Trump said defense contractors are too slow to deliver equipment and too slow to maintain and repair equipment.

items.title: Alaska Airlines bets on Boeing with its biggest aircraft deal for global expansion
